Video.summary: Katie says her boyfriend, Brandon, is addicted to porn and has caught him sending dirty letters to other women including her mother! Then, 6 months into dating Crosby, Dayana cheated on him and now, he wants to know if their child is his!
Video.title: You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?

Image.alt: You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?
You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?
You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?

Video.summary: Katie’s fed up with her brother-in-law Gary’s racist and disrespectful behavior. His conduct has landed him in jail, isolated him from his biracial niece, and is now influencing his 5-year-old daughter. Will he change for the better?
Video.title: Steve Confronts a Racist

Video.summary: Kaliegh is 23 and is a heroin addict. Her mother, best friend and ex-boyfriend who got her hooked on heroin in the first place, are here to beg her to go to rehab. Follow her as she travels to the rehab clinic and tries to get clean!
Video.title: My Daughter Prostitutes for Heroin

Video.summary: Jackie and her children live with a registered sex offender; accused of touching his own son, Ronnie takes a lie-detector test and demands a DNA test too.
Video.title: You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids

Image.alt: You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids
You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids
You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids

Video.summary: Three years ago, Manny was accused of sexually molesting Elizabeth’s daughter. While he declares his innocence, Elizabeth has strong doubts and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is he innocent?
Video.title: A Mother’s Rage

Video.summary: Ashley alleges that her fiancé John has repeatedly abused both her and her son. To make matters worse, this isn't John's first incident with abuse, as his former girlfriend, another Ashley, was also abused and is now here to save her friend.
Video.title: Will You Stay To Get Beat?

Image.alt: Will You Stay To Get Beat?
Will You Stay To Get Beat?
Will You Stay To Get Beat?

Video.summary: Ijwaun and Terrika are back for another DNA test; Molly and Kendall seek DNA results.
Video.title: I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce

Image.alt: I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce
I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce
I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce

Video.summary: Denise found out that Jamaul had another woman staying with him while she was out of town; Donna's husband claims that she has been unfaithful; Jason and Tammy's rocky relationship; lie detector tests for cheating accusations.
Video.title: Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?

Image.alt: Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?
Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?
Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?

Video.summary: Ashley believes her husband Michael may have molested their 3 year old son. Michael says she is making up this entire story so she can divorce him. Next, Anjail believes Dwight has been physically abusing their son.
Video.title: He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends

Image.alt: He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends
He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends
He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends

Video.summary: William received a strange voicemail and became convinced that his girlfriend Jo was drugging him and sneaking men into their house to cheat. Plus, Donovan believes Lacara has been cheating, but she says she confessed so the accusations would stop!
Video.title: Crazy Allegations, Shocking Results!

Video.summary: Maria's fiance texts their ex-roommate, saying he wants to leave Maria and be with her; Lisa has lost four jobs because her partner overzealously tries to prevent her from cheating on him.
Video.title: He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw

Image.alt: He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw
He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw
He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw

Video.summary: After finding porn and several email and text exchanges with transsexuals, Quintiqua is demanding that her boyfriend prove if he is bi-sexual or not! Then, Herb dug up proof in the form of pictures of Carl and a woman named Deanna online.
Video.title: Do You Have A Gay Double Life?

Image.alt: Do You Have A Gay Double Life?
Do You Have A Gay Double Life?
Do You Have A Gay Double Life?

Video.summary: This mother is trying to regain custody of her daughter which she was convicted of abusing and neglecting. But Steve will not let her even get close to that child.
Video.title: Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test

Image.alt: Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test
Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test
Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test

Video.summary: Friends Raychele and Junova deny stealing from their employer, but one of them is not telling the truth; Gabrielle suspects that her sisters stole $1,000 from her purse.
Video.title: Did You Steal The Money That Got Me Fired?

Image.alt: Did You Steal The Money That Got Me Fired?
Did You Steal The Money That Got Me Fired?
Did You Steal The Money That Got Me Fired?

Video.summary: Donnie's wife disappeared with his cousin for hours and refused to take his phone calls; another parent told Angelina that her boyfriend was cheating with a prostitute.
Video.title: Your Story Is Shady

Video.summary: Steve helps Jason, a father desperate to straighten out his son, Brandon, who likes to steal, vandalize, and sell drugs. Today Steve’s taking Brandon to Wayne County Jail to give him a preview of where he might end up if he doesn’t clean up his act.
Video.title: Steve, Lock Up My Son

Video.summary: Ashley's mother is here because she says she's witnessed first hand Ashley's boyfriend Scott's abusive ways. She says that Scott has completely isolated Ashley and her grandchild from the rest of her family.
Video.title: You Want Him To Be The Father?

Image.alt: You Want Him To Be The Father?
You Want Him To Be The Father?
You Want Him To Be The Father?

Video.summary: Alec called the show to say that his girlfriend Tori is being physically and mentally abusive. He says he needs Steve to help him give her a wakeup call and start showing him the respect that he deserves.
Video.title: My Girlfriend Beats Me

Video.summary: Shantee has been forced into prostitution by her boyfriend Tim. When she refused, he beat her, once causing her to suffer a miscarriage. Tim prides himself on controlling and using her as property, but Steve isn’t about to let this continue!
Video.title: He Punches Me Until I Prostitute

Image.alt: He Punches Me Until I Prostitute
He Punches Me Until I Prostitute
He Punches Me Until I Prostitute

Video.summary: Destiny is accused of being a pathological liar and faking her own pregnancy and miscarriage with her once boyfriend.
Video.title: DNA Shocker

Video.summary: Tara’s 57-year-old mother raises her son while she lives in a van and succumbs to a severe drug addiction. While she claims she is ready for a change, her mother and young son are skeptical. Will Tara’s drive to be a better mother prove genuine?
Video.title: Crack Mom Lives in a Van

Image.alt: Crack Mom Lives in a Van
Crack Mom Lives in a Van
Crack Mom Lives in a Van

Video.summary: Chris fears that his girlfriend is still sleeping with her abusive ex; Quay thinks constant arguments over cheating caused her to miscarry her twins; Raena says her man accuses her of cheating with every man she happens to be around.
Video.title: Blindsided by Results

Video.summary: After breaking up, Janell gave birth to their second child, but does not allow Rolando to be alone with the child because she believes that he abused their first baby. Then, Kayla is 14 years old and pregnant with Garret's child.
Video.title: Too Young to Be Parents

Video.summary: Colleen's son, Dalton has suffered with cancer for ten years. Patrick, the boy's father, left the picture when Dalton was only an infant, and after falling on hard times ended up homeless. But now he wants to be back in Dalton's life.
Video.title: Where's That Fight For Your Son?

Image.alt: Where's That Fight For Your Son?
Where's That Fight For Your Son?
Where's That Fight For Your Son?

Video.summary: Ryan denies that the condom his wife found in her car was his; Byronica, a young mother of five, says she will divorce her husband if he fails his lie-detector test.
Video.title: Steve's Had Enough!

Video.summary: Alfred thinks his partner is living a secret life; Demetrius says his wife is having an affair and gave him an STD; Latavia's ex-boyfriend takes a lie-detector test to try to win her back.
Video.title: If You Didn't Cheat, How Did You Get an STD?

Image.alt: If You Didn't Cheat, How Did You Get an STD?
If You Didn't Cheat, How Did You Get an STD?
If You Didn't Cheat, How Did You Get an STD?

Video.summary: Steve's looking back on some of the funniest moments from his show. You'll definitely laugh out loud at these unforgettable guests. Don't miss one second of the fun on today's Steve Wilkos Show.
Video.title: The Lighter Side of Steve

Video.summary: Secrets revealed ... Since the start of their relationship, Nareda has slowly been discovering more and more of Kenny's secrets. On their wedding day, she first learned that he had lied about his age and was only 18 years old, much younger than she. She also came to learn he was verbally and physically abusive. Now that she suspects he's been cheating, she wants the truth, and she's making a final decision on her misleading relationship.
Video.title: Not A Big Shocker

Video.summary: Nykki, Jayda, Tammy and Pamela are here because Larry has fathered children with them. They say Larry not only an abusive deadbeat, but also engages in drugs, alcohol and pimps some of them out. Don’t miss the drama today!
Video.title: Steve is Speechless

Video.summary: Jayshanice suspects her physically abusive boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Scared to Death

Video.summary: Latoya is worried that her sister Tenielle’s boyfriend Ashley is molesting Tenielle’s 4 year old daughter! Latoya and the child’s father Antonio are here because they demand Ashley prove his innocence with a lie detector test!
Video.title: Explosive Lie Detector Results

Video.summary: TJ refuses to let Ashley see their child after a video of her blowing marijuana smoke into the baby’s face. Then, Tiffany blames Shawn for their 10 year old daughter’s smoking and wandering the streets. Can Steve intervene before it’s too late?
Video.title: Bad Mom Caught on Tape
